title: GCD
description: Write a program to find the max GCD (greatest common divisor) among any pairs of the input integers.
input: The input contains positive integers, greater than zero and less than 1 million. The input may include at most 100 integers.
output: Print out the max value of GCD of any pairs.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Thailand, Thailand Southern Programming Contest, Thailand Southern Programming Contest 2013 연습 세션, WeissBlume
